design_philosophy: Government-grade, authoritative, clean, Élysée meets Abidjan. No startup SaaS fluff, state-level seriousness. Every pixel serves the mission.

typography.rules: Strict adherence to user constraints: Inter used universally. Banned E1 rules for Serif headings to honor 'typography Inter' constraint.
typography.headings: Tight tracking (-0.02em) on all headings to create an authoritative, premium editorial feel.

spacing_and_layout.sidebar: w-[280px] bg-[#1A202C] text-white fixed h-full left-0 top-0 border-r border-[#1A202C]
spacing_and_layout.header: h-[64px] bg-[#FFFFFF] border-b border-[#E2E8F0] fixed top-0 right-0 left-[280px] z-20 px-8 flex items-center justify-between
spacing_and_layout.grid_system: Bento-style tight grids for Dashboard (gap-6). grid-cols-12 base. No unnecessary gaps.

components.progress_bars: h-[8px] rounded-full bg-gradient-to-r from-[#FF8200] to-[#009E49] w-full border border-[#1A202C]/5

status_badges.done: flex w-fit items-center gap-2 px-2.5 py-1 text-sm font-medium bg-[#009E49]/10 text-[#009E49] rounded-full before:content-[''] before:block before:w-1.5 before:h-1.5 before:rounded-full before:bg-[#009E49]
status_badges.in_progress: flex w-fit items-center gap-2 px-2.5 py-1 text-sm font-medium bg-[#FF8200]/10 text-[#FF8200] rounded-full before:content-[''] before:block before:w-1.5 before:h-1.5 before:rounded-full before:bg-[#FF8200] before:animate-[pulse_2s_cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.6,1)_infinite]
status_badges.blocked: flex w-fit items-center gap-2 px-2.5 py-1 text-sm font-medium bg-red-600/10 text-red-700 rounded-full before:content-[''] before:block before:w-1.5 before:h-1.5 before:rounded-full before:bg-red-600
status_badges.not_started: flex w-fit items-center gap-2 px-2.5 py-1 text-sm font-medium bg-gray-100 text-[#4A5568] rounded-full before:content-[''] before:block before:w-1.5 before:h-1.5 before:rounded-full before:bg-gray-400

buttons.primary: bg-[#1A202C] text-white hover:bg-[#1A202C]/90 rounded-[6px] px-4 py-2 font-medium transition-colors shadow-sm
buttons.accent: bg-[#FF8200] text-white hover:bg-[#FF8200]/90 rounded-[6px] px-4 py-2 font-medium transition-colors shadow-sm
buttons.ghost: text-[#1A202C] hover:bg-[#F7F7F5] rounded-[6px] px-4 py-2 font-medium transition-colors

tables.wrapper: bg-[#FFFFFF] rounded-[8px] shadow-[0_2px_10px_rgba(26,32,44,0.04)] border border-[#1A202C]/5 overflow-hidden
tables.header: bg-[#F7F7F5] text-xs font-semibold uppercase tracking-[0.05em] text-[#718096] py-3 px-4 border-b border-[#E2E8F0]

icons_and_assets.style: LINE ART ONLY. Single-weight strokes (1.5px), no fill. NO photos. NO 3D. NO gradients on icons.
icons_and_assets.colors: Icons should use either #C5A028 (Gold) for section/accent icons or #1A202C (Dark Slate) for standard UI icons.
custom_svgs_required: Coat of Arms of Côte d'Ivoire: Use a custom clean SVG path composed of minimal strokes (elephant head, shield, palm trees, sun). If impossible, substitute with a highly stylized, single-stroke Lucide Shield combined with Sun.
Stars/Palm Trees: Use Lucide 'Star' and 'TreePalm' with strokeWidth={1.5}.

pages.name: Login
pages.layout: Centered clean card (max-w-md) on #F7F7F5 background. Line-art coat of arms at the top. Minimalist inputs.
pages.features: Email/password authentication. French UI ('Connexion', 'Mot de passe').

pages.name: Executive Dashboard
pages.layout: Grid-based (Bento style). Top: 4 Hero KPI cards. Middle: Donut Chart (Pillars) + Line Chart (Budget Trajectory 2026-2030). Bottom: Top 10 Priority Actions Table.
pages.features: Cards show total budget, spent, global progress %, total actions, late actions with red pulse indicator. Global filter in the header for Pillar/Sector/Year/Owner.

pages.name: Tree View
pages.layout: Split view. Left: Collapsible nested tree list. Right: Slide-in detail panel (Framer Motion).
pages.features: Hierarchy: PILLAR (6) -> SECTOR (43) -> EFFECT -> PRODUCT -> ACTION. Color-coded progress bars in the panel. Global search with autocomplete.

pages.name: Actions Table
pages.layout: Full-width data table filling the main content area.
pages.features: Columns: code, title, owner, total budget, progress, status, deadline. Inline CRUD editing (click row to edit fields). Multi-filter, Export button simulating a toast download.

pages.name: Budget Analytics
pages.features: Stacked bar chart (budget by pillar x year). Waterfall chart (variance planned vs actual). Execution rate bar charts by sector.

pages.name: Alerts Center
pages.layout: Action-oriented list or grid of critical warning cards.
pages.features: Shows blocked actions with reason, overdue actions, zero budget actions. Each has a 'Send Reminder' ('Envoyer un rappel') ghost button.

interactions_and_motion.hover_states: Rows tint to #FFF7ED. Cards have a very subtle -translate-y-[1px] and shadow increase.
interactions_and_motion.transitions: Use Framer Motion for the right-side detail panel slide-in (x: '100%' to x: 0).
interactions_and_motion.toasts: Slide-in from bottom-right using Sonner. Dark mode styling for toasts: bg-[#1A202C] text-white border-none.
interactions_and_motion.loading: Skeleton screens with slow pulse animation (bg-[#E2E8F0]) for all views. No spinner loaders.

accessibility_and_testing.language: French (fr-FR). All text MUST be in French.

instructions_to_main_agent.1: Use ONLY `.js` and `.jsx` files. DO NOT use TypeScript (`.ts`/`.tsx`) as per environment constraints.
instructions_to_main_agent.2: Language: The entire UI must be in flawless French. Date formats: DD/MM/YYYY. Currency: Millions FCFA.
instructions_to_main_agent.3: Routing: Implement a root layout wrapping authenticated views with the fixed Sidebar (left) and Header (top). Login is a separate unauthenticated route.
instructions_to_main_agent.4: Shadcn UI Customization: Strip away 'Vercel/SaaS' defaults. Enforce 8px border-radius (`rounded-[8px]`). Remove heavy ring shadows; use subtle borders.
instructions_to_main_agent.5: Progress Bars: Do not use native Shadcn progress if it restricts gradients. Build a custom `div` with `h-[8px] rounded-full bg-gradient-to-r from-[#FF8200] to-[#009E49]`.
instructions_to_main_agent.6: Line Art: To get the Coat of Arms and specific Ivorian iconography, build custom SVG components using paths that have `stroke='#C5A028'` or `stroke='#1A202C'`, `strokeWidth={1.5}`, and `fill='none'`. NO FILL.
instructions_to_main_agent.7: Tree View: Use recursive React components with indented left padding. When clicking a node, render a `framer-motion` sliding panel fixed to the right side of the screen.
instructions_to_main_agent.8: Charts: Use `recharts`. Build a custom composed chart for the waterfall if `recharts` native waterfall is too rigid.
instructions_to_main_agent.9: CRUD: Implement inline editing directly in the Actions Table. When a user clicks 'Edit', swap text nodes for simple, unstyled `<input>` fields that save on blur or enter.
instructions_to_main_agent.10: Test IDs: Strictly adhere to adding `data-testid` to all interactive elements for automated testing.
